reasoning: Initial observation suggests the resistors are in series. Increasing R1 will help confirm if the total resistance increases linearly.
Increasing R1 did not change the total resistance, suggesting R1 and R2 are in parallel.
The total resistance remains constant when R2 is increased, indicating that R1 and R2 are in parallel. The equation for parallel resistors is 1/total_resistance = 1/R1 + 1/R2.
